visual_mood: Objective, rigid, functional, technical, high-contrast. Minimalist 'Control Room' aesthetic.

mono.usage: Code blocks, IP addresses, IDs, technical specs, Terminal/CLI output

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for dense data. p-12 or p-16 for landing/token entry.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms. Center alignment only for Token Entry modal.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (#0F0F10), 1px border-border/40, no shadow. Technical Grid Borders approach.
surfaces.header: Solid background (#050505) with border-b border-border/40. Sticky z-50.
surfaces.modals: Solid surface (#0F0F10) with sharp edges or max 4px radius, 1px border-border.

components.buttons: Square or max rounded-sm. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200. Secondary: border border-border/40 hover:bg-white/5.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Dense rows (py-2 or py-3). Grid borders style - visible bottom borders on rows. Use JetBrains Mono for IPs and IDs.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Override fixed heights (h-auto). Technical underline style preferred over pill style.
components.inputs: Shadcn Form/Input. Flat, bg-black, border-white/10, focus:border-white/40 focus:ring-0. Square or rounded-sm.
components.dialogs: Shadcn Dialog. Dark solid background, subtle border, no heavy backdrop-blur to maintain performance.
components.toasts: Sonner. Dark mode theme, bottom-right placement.
components.data_display: Use 'Label + Value' pairs heavily. Labels in uppercase overline style. Values in high-contrast text or monospace.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border color shifts (border-white/10 to border-white/20). NO transform scales for dashboard items.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use monospace ASCII loaders or simple fast linear progress bars at the top of the screen.

icons.style: Regular or Light weight. Minimalist, technical aesthetic.

login_background.description: Dynamic abstract image of blue light streaks in motion over a dark background.
login_background.usage: Use as a full-screen ambient background behind the API Token entry modal. Must have a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-black/80 or gradient) to maintain deep dark mode and high contrast for the login modal.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, inputs, and key data points MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='droplet-connect-button', data-testid='droplet-row-1234').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Start by implementing the API Token entry view. Ensure it persists token securely (localStorage/sessionStorage).
2. Build the main dashboard layout with a Top Nav and a dense, Control Room-style data grid.
3. Use Shadcn components for Data Tables, Tabs, Dialogs, Selects, and Forms.
4. Droplet List: Display droplets in a dense table. Use JetBrains Mono for IPs. Include quick actions in the row.
5. Droplet Details: Use a multi-tab interface (Overview, Power, Snapshots, Reinstall, Console).
6. Windows Reinstall Panel: Build a dedicated form for selecting OS version, setting RDP port/password, and displaying the generated reinstall bash command. Ensure destructive confirmation.
7. Apply 'Grid Borders' styling: subtle 1px white/10 borders to separate sections. Avoid deep shadows.
8. Ensure WCAG AA contrast for text, explicitly defining hover states (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white).
10. Do NOT use fake image placeholders. Use only the provided image URL or CSS styling.
